info.title: ThreatConnect API
info.description: ThreatConnect v3 REST API for threat intelligence and case management. Provides CRUD operations for groups, indicators, cases, tasks, and more. Uses HMAC-SHA256 authentication with API access IDs and secret keys. Supports TQL (ThreatConnect Query Language) for advanced filtering.

get.description: Retrieve a list of Artifact Types objects. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination.

hmac.name: Authorization
hmac.description: HMAC-SHA256 authentication. Header format: TC {AccessID}:{HMAC-SHA256-Signature}. The signature is computed over: {HTTP_Method}:{URI_Path}:{Timestamp}

tags.name: Case Management
tags.description: Case management endpoints for security operations workflows
